Issue: The purpose of the system is not fully described, lacking specific details on the expected outcomes and benefits.
Correction: The purpose of the system is to process network packets and visualize the results to optimize preprocessing configurations, aiding in network analysis and performance evaluation.

Issue: The scope of the system is not fully detailed, missing specific functionalities and limitations.
Correction: The scope of the system includes preprocessing network packets using PCA and autoencoder methods, visualizing results, and comparing different configurations. It is limited to analyzing static PCAP files and does not support real-time analysis.

Issue: The overview section lacks a detailed description of the system's architecture and components.
Correction: The system consists of a main window with a menu bar, configuration panel, topology panel, statistics panel, results panel, and performance panel. It supports loading PCAP files, configuring preprocessors, running preprocessing, and visualizing results.

Issue: Functional requirements are not fully detailed, missing specific conditions and expected outcomes.
Correction: The system shall allow users to load PCAP files, configure preprocessors, run preprocessing, and visualize results. It shall support saving and loading sessions, comparing runs, and exporting graphs as images.

Issue: Should-have requirements are not fully detailed, missing specific functionalities and expected outcomes.
Correction: The system should provide subwindows for PCAP file statistics, allow changing shown statistics, and display bar graphs and miscellaneous statistics of the PCAP file.

Issue: Could-have requirements are not fully detailed, missing specific functionalities and expected outcomes.
Correction: The system could provide communication details in popup boxes, open graphs in separate windows, support key bindings for common functionalities, display warnings for large data, and create session reports as PDF files.

Issue: Non-functional requirements are not fully detailed, missing specific performance and security criteria.
Correction: The system should be responsive, showing results within 1 second. It must be free from data leaks, ensuring no PCAP information is accessible via the website source. The design should allow easy expansion and thorough documentation.

Issue: Test cases are not fully detailed, missing specific conditions and expected outcomes.
Correction: Test cases should include starting the system, loading PCAP files, saving and loading sessions, running preprocessing, updating panels, changing configurations, and exporting results. Advanced cases should cover node and edge information display, graph merging, and separate window management.

Issue: Test scenarios are not fully detailed, missing specific steps and expected outcomes.
Correction: Test scenarios should include comparing configurations, loading previous sessions, exporting graphs as PNG, and opening graphs in separate windows. Each scenario should detail the steps and expected outcomes for validation.
